case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. CHANVIT PATANAPANICH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PATANAPANICH, CHANVIT DBA PAD THAI EXPRESS RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
